channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Food Industry Uses 'Make America Healthy Again' Movement to Push Weaker Federal Regulations
item.description: The processed food industry is leveraging the 'Make America Healthy Again' (MAHA) movement to lobby for federal standards that could undercut stricter state-level regulations on food additives, labeli...

item.title: Severe Storm in Cape Town Causes Flooding, Damage, and Three Deaths
item.description: Cape Town and surrounding areas in the Western Cape are grappling with severe storm conditions that have resulted in widespread flooding, property damage, and three reported fatalities. Emergency serv...

item.title: The Importance of True Global Diversification for Canadian Investors
item.description: Many Canadian investors believe their portfolios are diversified, but in reality, they often remain heavily concentrated in domestic markets or a few U.S. companies. Canadian equities account for only...

item.title: Analysis of Jim Chalmers’ Budget: Impact on Generational Wealth
item.description: In tonight’s edition of 'Up Late', commentator Ben Harvey critiques Treasurer Jim Chalmers’ latest budget, suggesting it disproportionately benefits younger generations while relying on funds from wea...

item.title: Bangla Pokkho leader Garga Chatterjee arrested for spreading alleged misinformation on EVMs in Bengal elections
item.description: Garga Chatterjee, the leader of the pro-Bengali advocacy organisation Bangla Pokkho, has been taken into custody by Kolkata Police over allegations of spreading misinformation about Electronic Voting ...

item.title: UK government borrowing costs rise sharply, putting economic pressure on Starmer
item.description: The United Kingdom is currently experiencing a significant increase in borrowing costs, reaching levels not seen for decades. This rise in government borrowing rates comes amid growing economic pressu...

item.title: Concerns over weak prosecution of leopard-related wildlife crimes in South Africa
item.description: This opinion piece argues that South Africa’s National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) is failing to properly enforce existing environmental and animal protection laws in cases involving leopards, a prote...

item.title: Pakistan clarifies Iranian aircraft presence at Nur Khan airbase during ceasefire
item.description: The Foreign Office of Pakistan has firmly dismissed a report by a US-based media outlet claiming that Iranian aircraft were stationed at Nur Khan Airbase in Rawalpindi, calling the report misleading a...

item.title: 23-year-old in Crace charged with cannabis trafficking and firearm offences
item.description: A 23-year-old man from Crace has been charged following a five-month investigation by ACT Policing into alleged drug trafficking and illegal weapons possession. Police conducted a raid on the man's re...

item.title: Top Korean Restaurants in Manila Offering Authentic Korean Cuisine
item.description: This article presents a curated selection of Korean restaurants in Manila that stand out for their authenticity, quality, and strong adherence to traditional Korean flavours. Rather than focusing only...

item.title: Profile of Senators Supporting Alan Peter Cayetano as Senate President
item.description: On May 11, 2026, Senator Alan Peter Cayetano was elected as the Senate President, replacing Tito Sotto. His election came amid the second impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. Cayetano, a ...

item.title: U.S. Consumer Prices Likely Increased in April Following Oil Price Surge and Rent Adjustments
item.description: U.S. consumer prices are expected to have risen significantly in April, marking the largest annual inflation increase in more than two and a half years. Economists anticipate a 0.6 per cent monthly in...

item.title: J.C.D. Prabhakar and M. Ravisankar unanimously elected as Speaker and Deputy Speaker of Tamil Nadu Assembly
item.description: On May 12, 2026, J.C.D. Prabhakar of the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), representing the Thousand Lights constituency in Chennai, was unanimously elected as the Speaker of the 17th Tamil Nadu Legisla...

item.title: DRC Creates Paramilitary Mining Guard Unit with US and UAE Partnership Support
item.description: The Democratic Republic of Congo through its Inspection Générale des Mines has announced the creation of a special paramilitary unit known as the mining guard. This new force, planned to reach over 20...

item.title: Kwankwaso explains why more Nigerians are joining the NDC coalition ahead of 2027
item.description: Former Kano State Governor, Rabiu Kwankwaso, don talk say plenty Nigerians dey move towards the new Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) coalition because of too much disappointment with the current lead...

item.title: Barrie police prevent a young man from driving while allegedly impaired
item.description: Barrie police recently intervened to prevent a 22-year-old man from operating a vehicle while allegedly impaired. The incident highlights ongoing concerns about road safety and impaired driving in Ont...

item.title: The Impact of Authorship Practices on Gender Equity in Academic Research
item.description: Modern scientific research is almost always collaborative, often involving teams that span multiple institutions and countries. Despite this, academic recognition is typically reduced to a list of aut...

item.title: CBSE Class 12 Board Results 2026: Step-by-Step Guide to Download Scorecards via DigiLocker

item.title: Federal Budget 2026 Introduces Changes to Property Taxes and Worker Support
item.description: The 2026 federal budget, delivered by Treasurer Jim Chalmers, introduces significant changes to Australia’s property and taxation landscape. Key measures include adjustments to negative gearing, capit...

item.title: SC Refers Iman Mazari and Hadi Chattha’s Sentence Suspension Pleas to IHC for Decision
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Supreme Court on Tuesday instructed the Islamabad High Court (IHC) to decide the sentence suspension applications filed by lawyer and rights activist Iman Mazari and her husband Hadi Al...
